name: Chicken in Browned Butter Sage Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 boned and skinned chicken breast halves
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a heavy skillet over medium-high heat until hot but not smoking.
2. Sauté the chicken breasts until golden brown on the outside and cooked through, about 5-8 minutes on each side.
3. Remove the skillet from the heat and cover to keep the chicken warm.
4. Melt the butter in a small sauce pan over medium-high heat.
5. Boil just until it starts to turn golden brown.
6. Add the fresh sage leaves and stir until they are crisp.
7. Place each chicken breast on a heated plate.
8. Sprinkle the Parmesan cheese over them equally.
9. Pour the browned butter evenly over both chicken breasts and cheese.
10. Place 4 of the sage leaves on each chicken breast.
11. Serve immediately.
